title: Why Motion Design Is Defining Modern Digital Communication - ZillionDesigns
description: Brands need more motion graphics than static designs to deliver a more engaging user experience and strengthen their brand presence in digital ecosystems.

title: Thousands of Zillow listings in Chicago have vanished. Here's why - Chicago Sun-Times
description: The loss of Zillow's Chicago-area listings makes a behind-the-scenes real estate fight public. And it could hinder consumers in their search to buy a home.
